description: Ilja Moisejevs and Richard Wu discuss the evolution of Tensor and the launch of Vector, a social trading app that combines trading with social media elements. They share insights on product development, user engagement, and the challenges faced in the crypto space.
topic_summary: The conversation covers the history of Tensor, the transition to Vector, and the unique features of the social trading app, including its integration of on-chain trades and social feeds [t=249].
